tasks.label: Install & Build godot-mcp-runtime
tasks.command: cd Mcp\godot-mcp-runtime ; npm install ; npm run build

tasks.label: Run GdUnit4 Tests
tasks.command: cd . && godot --path . -s res://addons/gdUnit4/bin/GdUnitCmdTool.gd --add res://test/ 2>&1 | Tee-Object -FilePath test_output.log

inputs.description: Full path to Godot executable (e.g. C:\Program Files\Godot\Godot.exe)
